recovery_sources: Operational Intelligence System (OIS) — Complete Feature and Function Deep Dive (2).docx
Operational Intelligence System (OIS) - Complete Feature and Function Deep Dive (2).docx

signals.name: Mid-shift 86 surprise
signals.description: Items go unavailable mid-service without early warning or substitution planning.
signals.source_ref: compass-market-analysis: intervention planning over fragmented tools

signals.name: Bar ticket delay
signals.description: Drink production holds back table progression or guest satisfaction.
signals.source_ref: deep-dive: service bottlenecks and throughput signals

signals.name: Closing reset failures
signals.description: The closing shift leaves unresolved prep, cleaning, or stock problems for the next day.
signals.source_ref: pre-seed-business-case: recurring operational drag between shifts

signals.name: Inventory count variance
signals.description: Actual counts regularly differ from expected stock on hand.
signals.source_ref: compass-market-analysis: control loops and operator trust

signals.name: Expo calls missing
signals.description: The pass lacks consistent verbal callouts for timing, fire, and pickup.
signals.source_ref: deep-dive: root-cause transparency between stations

signals.name: Recurring guest complaints
signals.description: Complaint frequency indicates an unresolved service or product issue.
signals.source_ref: deep-dive: operational intake examples

signals.name: Line check missing
signals.description: The line opens without a complete readiness check across product, equipment, and station setup.
signals.source_ref: deep-dive: diagnostic engine from opening risk to response

signals.name: Manager floor absence
signals.description: Managers are not visibly present during the venue's most critical service windows.
signals.source_ref: pre-seed-business-case: execution decays without leadership presence

signals.name: Opening checklist drift
signals.description: Opening standards vary enough that readiness depends on who opened the venue.
signals.source_ref: deep-dive: operator memory should not be the system

signals.name: Prep inconsistency
signals.description: Prep quality or completion varies by shift.
signals.source_ref: deep-dive: signals as surface symptoms

signals.name: Reservation pacing breakdown
signals.description: Reservation waves hit the floor without pacing rules or release logic.
signals.source_ref: deep-dive: intake examples and venue pressure points

signals.name: Section imbalance
signals.description: Some service sections overload while others remain underused.
signals.source_ref: pre-seed-business-case: labor inefficiency and execution drag

signals.name: Service delay
signals.description: Guests wait too long for the next service touchpoint.
signals.source_ref: deep-dive: operational intake and diagnostic engine

signals.name: Shift brief missing
signals.description: Managers are not running a structured pre-shift briefing.
signals.source_ref: deep-dive: welcome briefing and plans

signals.name: Staff confusion
signals.description: Team members show uncertainty about priorities or handoffs.
signals.source_ref: business-case: symptom blindness

signals.name: Table turn stall
signals.description: Tables remain uncleared or unseated long enough to slow service capacity.
signals.source_ref: pre-seed-business-case: symptom blindness in service flow

signals.name: Kitchen ticket bottleneck
signals.description: Tickets stack in production and delay flow through the kitchen.
signals.source_ref: consulting artifact: kitchen transformation

signals.name: Voids and comps rising
signals.description: The venue is losing margin through avoidable service recovery costs.
signals.source_ref: consulting artifact: volume decline and controls

signals.name: Waitlist estimate mismatch
signals.description: Quoted wait times do not match actual seating readiness.
signals.source_ref: deep-dive: operator trust depends on transparent signals

signals.name: Waste spike
signals.description: Unexpected food waste suggests prep, forecasting, or controls issues.
signals.source_ref: business-case: fragmented tool stack

failure_modes.name: Bar workflow breakdown
failure_modes.description: Bar station sequencing, setup, or priority rules do not support service demand.

failure_modes.name: Leadership briefing gap
failure_modes.description: The venue lacks a daily rhythm for prioritization and coordination.
failure_modes.source_ref: deep-dive: welcome briefing and role-based intelligence

failure_modes.name: Control loop gap
failure_modes.description: The venue does not close the loop on loss, waste, or recovery incidents.

failure_modes.name: Deployment misalignment
failure_modes.description: Sectioning and role deployment do not match the real demand pattern.
failure_modes.source_ref: pre-seed-business-case: initiative fatigue from constant firefighting

failure_modes.name: Host flow breakdown
failure_modes.description: Seating, quoting, and reservation release logic are not standardized.
failure_modes.source_ref: deep-dive: signal to root-cause visibility for front-of-house

failure_modes.name: Inventory accuracy gap
failure_modes.description: Inventory counts, depletion, and item status updates are unreliable.

failure_modes.name: Manager presence gap
failure_modes.description: Managers are not deployed where live coaching and escalation are needed.
failure_modes.source_ref: pre-seed-business-case: leadership attention is a hard constraint

failure_modes.name: Menu complexity overload
failure_modes.description: Menu complexity exceeds current production capability.

failure_modes.name: Open-close control gap
failure_modes.description: Opening and closing routines are not enforced as a repeatable control system.
failure_modes.source_ref: pre-seed-business-case: recurring drag from unmanaged resets

failure_modes.name: Pass communication gap
failure_modes.description: The kitchen pass lacks shared timing language and pickup discipline.
failure_modes.source_ref: deep-dive: handoff clarity across venue systems

failure_modes.name: Prep system breakdown
failure_modes.description: Prep sequencing, ownership, or standards are inconsistent.

failure_modes.name: Shift readiness gap
failure_modes.description: The team enters service without validating readiness across the critical stations.
failure_modes.source_ref: deep-dive: operational health depends on pre-service discipline

failure_modes.name: Insufficient training protocol
failure_modes.description: Training relies on memory and shadowing instead of a repeatable system.

failure_modes.name: Undefined workflow structure
failure_modes.description: Core service steps and handoffs are not explicitly designed.

response_patterns.name: Bar execution reset
response_patterns.description: Stabilize bar priority rules, setup, and handoff with the service floor.
response_patterns.source_ref: deep-dive: system response should narrow to executable interventions

response_patterns.name: Deployment reset
response_patterns.description: Realign sectioning, peak deployment, and manager coverage to true venue demand.
response_patterns.source_ref: pre-seed-business-case: capacity-aware plans instead of generic advice

response_patterns.name: Host pacing reset
response_patterns.description: Standardize wait quoting, seating release logic, and reservation pacing.
response_patterns.source_ref: deep-dive: response pattern activation from front-of-house signals

response_patterns.name: Inventory accuracy reset
response_patterns.description: Tighten count cadence, 86 logic, and depletion updates so stock is trustworthy in service.
response_patterns.source_ref: compass-market-analysis: structured operational intelligence beats dashboards

response_patterns.name: Leadership rhythm reset
response_patterns.description: Install daily communication and escalation routines.

response_patterns.name: Manager presence reset
response_patterns.description: Install a visible floor presence and live coaching rhythm during peak windows.
response_patterns.source_ref: deep-dive: role-based intelligence and welcome briefs

response_patterns.name: Open-close reset
response_patterns.description: Turn opening and closing into an enforced operational control loop.

response_patterns.name: Pass communication reset
response_patterns.description: Install shared timing language and pickup discipline across the pass.
response_patterns.source_ref: deep-dive: response patterns should be transparent and teachable

response_patterns.name: Prep and control reset
response_patterns.description: Stabilize prep standards and management review loops.
response_patterns.source_ref: deep-dive: block activation and constraint engine

response_patterns.name: Service flow reset
response_patterns.description: Redesign the service path and role handoffs.

response_patterns.name: Training reset
response_patterns.description: Create structured onboarding and reinforcement around critical stations.

blocks.name: Create bar priority lane
blocks.description: Separate high-urgency drinks and table-critical tickets into a visible priority lane.
blocks.source_ref: pre-seed-business-case: bottlenecks need focused countermeasures

blocks.name: Build arrival pacing board
blocks.description: Create a live host board that shows reservation waves, walk-in pressure, and seat release decisions.
blocks.source_ref: pre-seed-business-case: planning must fit live venue reality

blocks.name: Build floor training checklist
blocks.description: Turn critical service behaviors into an onboarding and refresh checklist.
blocks.source_ref: deep-dive: block library

blocks.name: Run closing reset check
blocks.description: Create a non-negotiable close that resets prep, stock, cleaning, and unresolved actions.
blocks.source_ref: pre-seed-business-case: recurring next-day problems reflect missing reset logic

blocks.name: Create station role matrix
blocks.description: Define explicit station responsibilities and escalation points.
blocks.source_ref: business-case: symptom blindness

blocks.name: Launch daily 86 board
blocks.description: Create a visible board for depletion risk, substitutions, and item status changes before service.
blocks.source_ref: deep-dive: OIS should reduce surprise through visible system cues

blocks.name: Launch daily waste review
blocks.description: Review waste, causes, and corrective actions at the end of each day.
blocks.source_ref: business-case: tool fragmentation

blocks.name: Define wait quote rules
blocks.description: Set the rule set for quoted waits, release timing, and escalation when seating slips.
blocks.source_ref: deep-dive: transparent logic for operational decisions

blocks.name: Create guest recovery loop
blocks.description: Standardize complaint handling and close the loop on recurring failures.
blocks.source_ref: deep-dive: reports and plans

blocks.name: Run host reservation huddle
blocks.description: Introduce a short host huddle before peak windows to align pacing and escalation rules.
blocks.source_ref: deep-dive: welcome briefing adapted to station-level execution

blocks.name: Install expo callouts
blocks.description: Define and train the minimum pass language for fire, hold, and pickup timing.
blocks.source_ref: deep-dive: response blocks should explain exactly what changes on the floor

blocks.name: Install pre-shift briefing
blocks.description: Create a repeatable daily briefing for priorities, risks, and escalation.
blocks.source_ref: deep-dive: welcome briefing

blocks.name: Launch inventory count cycle
blocks.description: Install a focused count cadence for the items that most often create loss or service disruption.
blocks.source_ref: compass-market-analysis: operational control loops create defensibility

blocks.name: Run manager floor walk
blocks.description: Use a timed floor walk with coaching prompts and escalation checks during critical windows.
blocks.source_ref: deep-dive: proactive insight should tie back to live operational observation

blocks.name: Set manager peak-window plan
blocks.description: Assign where the manager stands, what they watch, and when they intervene during peak demand.
blocks.source_ref: deep-dive: capacity-aware actions need clear ownership

blocks.name: Map the service steps
blocks.description: Document every guest-facing service touchpoint and the owner of each handoff.
blocks.source_ref: consulting artifact: workflow restructuring

blocks.name: Run opening line readiness check
blocks.description: Create a structured opening read of product, equipment, station setup, and critical risks.
blocks.source_ref: deep-dive: opening readiness is a leading indicator

blocks.name: Rebalance sections
blocks.description: Redraw sectioning and support roles around actual cover flow and service mix.
blocks.source_ref: pre-seed-business-case: teams stall when deployment assumptions are wrong

blocks.name: Standardize prep sheet
blocks.description: Create a role-based prep sheet with clear ownership and quantities.
blocks.source_ref: consulting artifact: kitchen transformation

blocks.name: Run void and comp review huddle
blocks.description: Review every avoidable loss incident and assign follow-up actions.
blocks.source_ref: consulting artifact: controls loop

tools.name: 86 board template
tools.description: Template for item depletion alerts, substitutions, and sell-through priorities.
tools.source_ref: deep-dive: tool packs should improve live coordination

tools.name: Arrival pacing board
tools.description: Live board for reservation waves, walk-ins, and seat release decisions.
tools.source_ref: pre-seed-business-case: fragmented information creates confusion

tools.name: Bar priority board
tools.description: Visual lane for drink tickets that are blocking guest flow.
tools.source_ref: pre-seed-business-case: visible prioritization beats hidden queues

tools.name: Closing reset checklist
tools.description: Close-down checklist covering stock, prep, cleanliness, and unresolved actions.
tools.source_ref: pre-seed-business-case: systems should survive shift changes

tools.name: Expo callout card
tools.description: Reference card for pass callouts, timing language, and pickup triggers.
tools.source_ref: deep-dive: block library should carry practical tooling

tools.name: Floor walk sheet
tools.description: Timed observation sheet for coaching, escalation, and guest-flow checks.
tools.source_ref: deep-dive: operator-facing intelligence needs verification loops

tools.name: Guest recovery script
tools.description: Script for response, ownership, and follow-up after service failure.
tools.source_ref: deep-dive: reports and plans

tools.name: Host huddle template
tools.description: Peak-window host huddle template covering pacing, pressure points, and escalation.
tools.source_ref: deep-dive: welcome brief adapted for venue roles

tools.name: Inventory count sheet
tools.description: Targeted count sheet for high-risk inventory lines and variance review.
tools.source_ref: compass-market-analysis: structured intelligence requires trustworthy inputs

tools.name: Line readiness check
tools.description: Opening check for product, equipment, prep status, and immediate risks.
tools.source_ref: deep-dive: leading indicators should drive early intervention

tools.name: Peak-window plan
tools.description: Live plan for manager placement, section pressure, and intervention windows.
tools.source_ref: deep-dive: plans must respect available leadership capacity

tools.name: Prep sheet template
tools.description: Daily prep tracker with quantities, cutoffs, and owner.
tools.source_ref: consulting artifact: kitchen transformation

tools.name: Section deployment board
tools.description: Sectioning board that shows assignments, support roles, and backup ownership.
tools.source_ref: pre-seed-business-case: role clarity reduces firefighting

tools.name: Service observation sheet
tools.description: Checklist for observing service touchpoints and delays live on the floor.
tools.source_ref: consulting artifact: live service observation

tools.name: Shift brief template
tools.description: Structured agenda for pre-shift priorities, risks, and focus.
tools.source_ref: deep-dive: welcome briefing

tools.name: Station role matrix
tools.description: Role clarity matrix covering tasks, escalation, and backup ownership.
tools.source_ref: deep-dive: tool library

tools.name: Training checklist
tools.description: Station-specific training checklist with signoff.
tools.source_ref: deep-dive: block library

tools.name: Void review template
tools.description: Structured review of voids, comps, cause, and corrective action.
tools.source_ref: consulting artifact: financial controls

tools.name: Wait quote guide
tools.description: Simple decision guide for quoted waits, release timing, and escalation triggers.
tools.source_ref: deep-dive: operational decisions should be explainable

tools.name: Waste log
tools.description: Log for waste incidents, root causes, and actions.
